claims.statement: External reproduction gate evidence requires MESA-style input hashes, profile hashes, and retained model metadata.

sources.citation: Paxton, B. et al. (2011). Modules for Experiments in Stellar Astrophysics (MESA).
sources.note: MESA reference for solver-backed stellar evolution and profile artifacts.

claims.statement: A solar Stage 2 gate should include neutrino closure because solar neutrinos probe core fusion reactions more directly than surface observables.

sources.citation: Borexino Collaboration (2018). Comprehensive measurement of pp-chain solar neutrinos.

claims.statement: Solar neutrino residuals are useful observational probes of pp-chain model closure, with composition and flavor-conversion caveats.

sources.citation: Borexino Collaboration (2018). Comprehensive measurement of pp-chain solar neutrinos.
sources.note: Reference for pp, Be-7, pep, B-8, and related solar neutrino closure context.

claims.statement: GYRE-style mode summaries can support asteroseismic closure checks against stellar model outputs.

sources.citation: Townsend, R. H. D. and Teitler, S. A. (2013). GYRE: an open-source stellar oscillation code.

sources.note: Documentation for GYRE stellar oscillation outputs.

claims.statement: Stage 2 gate readiness requires uncertainty notes or a blocker, because one deterministic profile is not a population-level proof.

sources.citation: Carcassi, G., Landini, G. and Aidala, C. (2024). Classical mechanics as the high-entropy limit of quantum mechanics.
sources.note: Supports uncertainty-aware ensemble framing for QST-adjacent claims.

claims.statement: A Stage 2 gate ready-for-review verdict is not a certified Stage 2 promotion.

sources.citation: Paxton, B. et al. (2011). Modules for Experiments in Stellar Astrophysics (MESA).
sources.note: External solver artifacts support review gates but do not certify repo claim maturity by themselves.

claims.statement: hSpectralFit remains calibration-only at the Stage 2 gate and cannot claim a new or varying Planck constant.

sources.equation: h = 6.62607015e-34 J s exactly in the revised SI
sources.note: Reference for exact Planck constant value.

claims.statement: Neutron-star Stage 2 gate context is compact-object dense matter, not PP/CNO fusion closure.

sources.citation: Khomenko, V. et al. (2020). Turbulent, pinned superfluids in neutron stars and pulsar glitch recoveries.

claims.statement: Gaia-like star maps remain population-prior context and not direct quantum-spacetime evidence.

sources.citation: Gaia Collaboration (2023). Gaia Data Release 3: Summary of the content and survey properties.
sources.note: Gaia DR3 observational context for population priors.

claims.statement: StarSim fusion external reproduction is not direct ER=EPR evidence and cannot promote QST, Needle Hull, or warp claims to CL0-CL4.

sources.citation: Maldacena, J. and Susskind, L. (2013). Cool horizons for entangled black holes.
sources.note: ER=EPR conjectural context; not a stellar population bridge-inventory claim.
